reasoning: bc0ffc0e971.c L29: MallocSizeof alarm — `ch = malloc(sizeof(*ch))` type incompatibility. PC: __STRICT_ANSI__=T plus other stdlib macros. All conditions are library header macros, no feature config flags. Not a real bug in actual compilation.
